titleStmt.title: SII 19.80: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 80. (A.R. No. 83 of 1935.) TOṆḌŪR, GINGEE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON A BOULDER NEAR THE chēri OF THE VILLAGE.

summary.p: This records an endowment of the villages Guṇaneṟimaṅgalam alias Vaḻuvāmoḻi-Ārāndamaṅgalam and the hamlets Paḷḷiyuḍaiyāṉ-viḷāgam and Perumbaḷḷi-viḷāgam together with two garden-lands with wells at Toṇḍūr, as paḷḷichchandam to the Jaina teacher Vachchiraśiṅga-Iḷamperumānaḍigaḷ at Parambūr and his disciples in perpetuity, by the chief Viṇṇakōvaraiyaṉ Vayiri Malaiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 3vatu viṇṇako
varaiyaṉ vayiri malaiyaṉeṉ Eṉṉāṭṭuk kuṇaneṟimaṅ
kalamākiya vaḻuvāmoḻi Ārāntamaṅkalamu
m toṇṭurp paḷḷiyūṭaiyāṉviḷākamu maṭai
cceṟuvukku melpāl Attimoṭṭaik kiṇaṟu
n toṭṭamun toṇṭūrt teṟkilvācalil vaḻik
kuk kiḻpāl vaṭapāl kiṇaṟun toṭṭamu mivaḻiyiṉ
melvaḻi vaḻuvāmoḻip perumpaḷḷiviḷākamu
m Ivai yaṉaittum paṟampūr vacciraciṅka Iḷa
mperumāṉaṭikaḷukku mivarvaḻi māṇākkaṟku muri
ttākap paḷḷiccantamākat tāraiyaṭṭic ceytukuṭut
teṉ viṇ yaṉ vayiri malaiyaṉeṉ
Ivai ṭaik kumariyiṭai
ceyta puṇṇiyam peṟuvār .
Digital edition of SII 19.80 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
